---
title: 'Button Hole Earrings'
date: '2012-06-11T07:10:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'TEST TCC'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2298858291688335910'
blogger_filename: '/2012/06/button-hole-earrings.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/TEST TCC/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'TCC Jewelry'
---

<div style="text-align: center;">
<div style="text-align: left;">
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/" style="text-align: -webkit-auto;" target="">Home</a></div>
<h3>
 Button Hole&nbsp;Earrings</h3>
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/2012/06/tc-jewelry.html">Back to TC&amp;C Jewelry</a><br />
<br class="Apple-interchange-newline" /></div>
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0352-a-4186015abf76.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="150" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0352-a-bb9855c6425c.jpg" width="200" /></a></div>
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0350-b3a5d6ecb3a2.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0348-a-b8705423b5ba.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em; text-align: center;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0348-a-f55ba1cacd0c.jpg" width="168" /></a><img border="0" height="150" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0350-31edbc02ce89.jpg" width="200" /><br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/2012/06/tc-jewelry.html">Back to TC&amp;C Jewelry</a></div>
<br />
<br />
<br />
Thank you for visiting Texas Cows and Crafts!<br />
<br />
Please contact me with any questions or special&nbsp;requests:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/p/about-us.html">Click here.</a><br />
<br />
Flavia Wolfe<br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/">http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com</a><br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.etsy.com/shop/TexasCowsAndCrafts" target="_blank">Connect and Shop on &nbsp;our Etsy Store</a><br />
<br />
<a href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Texas-Cows-Crafts/298135563538323" target="_blank">Connect on Facebook</a><br />
<br />
<a href="https://plus.google.com/b/118156879240088112738/118156879240088112738/posts" target="_blank">Connect on Google+</a><br />
<br />
<iframe allowtransparency="true" src="//www.facebook.com/plugins/likebox.php?href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fpages%2FTexas-Cows-and-Crafts%2F298135563538323&amp;width=292&amp;height=62&amp;colorscheme=light&amp;show_faces=false&amp;border_color&amp;stream=false&amp;header=true" frameborder="0" scrolling="no" style="border-style: none; height: 100px; overflow: hidden; width: 250px;"></iframe>
